markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize content strategy, define workflows, and review the new performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Hub Location:** The new content hub will be a subfolder within the existing `/resources-library/` path. This decision, driven by Fieldguide's CMO, preserves the parent folder's SEO authority, which a new subfolder would lack.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** All content tasks will now be managed in Monday.com. GrowthX will create tasks, assign them to Fieldguide's Amanda, and set a due date to trigger notifications.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** A new Looker dashboard combines GA4 and Search Console data to track content performance, including a key "Cohorts" page that will measure GrowthX content by topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Production Cadence:** GrowthX will deliver one blog this week, five next week, and will now also produce all required creative assets.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

## Topics

### Content Hub Location

  - [**Decision:** The content hub will be a subfolder within the existing `/resources-library/` path.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This location was requested by Fieldguide's CMO. GrowthX confirmed it is an acceptable SEO compromise, as it leverages the parent folder's existing authority.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**Contingency:** A dedicated subfolder can be revisited if the new content performs well.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### New Workflow & Production

  - [**Project Management:** All content tasks will be managed in Monday.com.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Create tasks, assign to Amanda, and set a due date to trigger notifications.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Fieldguide:** Update task status to track progress.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Creative Assets:** GrowthX will now produce all creative assets for the blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida will share a sample graphic for the "PCI compliance" blog with Yasine for internal review.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [**Production Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [**This week:** 3 blogs in progress; 1 ready by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [**Next week:** 5 blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**CMS Access:** Yasine will grant GrowthX access to HubSpot to stage content directly.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

### Performance Dashboard Review

  - [GrowthX reviewed the new Looker dashboard, which combines data from GA4 and Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Key Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [**Engagement:** Tracks sessions vs. engaged sessions (10+ sec, clicks, scrolls). A high engagement rate (\>50%) is a key SEO signal.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Cohorts:** The primary page for tracking GrowthX content. It will group URLs by topic cluster to measure performance and refine strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Query Report:** Identifies valuable keywords where Fieldguide ranks on page 2-3 but lacks dedicated content. This signals an opportunity to create a targeted blog post that can quickly rank on page 1.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [**Data Note:** GA4 and Search Console data will differ.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [**GA4:** Tracks all traffic sources (organic, direct, LLMs).](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [**Search Console:** Tracks only organic Google traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Conversion Events:** The dashboard uses standard GA4 events. Yasine will investigate the "file download" event to understand its source.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Yasine:**](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
      - [Grant GrowthX access to HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Investigate the "file download" conversion event in GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [Share the sample graphic for the "PCI compliance" blog via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [Create the first blog task in Monday.com.](https://fathom.video/share/x_aS-y6Y7LTsg2pMzMUP-Gpwcjvxd3SU?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
